title: Budget to include additional salary
doc_html:
§622. Budget to include additional salary

           The governing authority of each of the parishes comprising the Twenty-Eighth Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary fixed in R.S. 16:621.
doc_text:
§622.  Budget to include additional salary
The governing authority of each of the parishes comprising the
Twenty-Eighth Judicial District shall annually, and at the same time it prepares
its general budget of expenses, budget an amount sufficient to pay the salary
fixed in R.S. 16:621.
